1.title: top-level security
1.description: your entries are encrypted and protected at all times.

4.description:
your journal is for your eyes only.
we respect your privacy.

features.title: a safe place for your thoughts

1.title: your thoughts are yours
1.description: shelter stores notes privately on your browser, so you can access them quickly, even offline. no one else can read them, not even us.

2.title: end to end encrypted
2.description: your entries are end-to-end encrypted and stored offline first. we never read, scan, or sell your data. period.

3.title: 0 trackers & 0 ads
3.description: we strictly never collect personal data. there are no trackers, no ads, and no hidden analytics following you around.

1.question: what is shelter?
1.answer: shelter is a secure place where your thoughts can breathe. it's a secure journal web app where you can write freely without judgment in your favorite browser.

2.question: is it open source?
2.answer: yes! you can find the source code on github and we welcome contributions.

3.question: where is the data stored?
3.answer: all your entries are stored locally in your browser using encrypted storage.

4.question: what is this project inspired by?
4.answer: this project is inspired by the comment section of the song "shelter" by porter robinson & madeon. many people write daily entries there, and we wanted to create a personal, private space for those small slices of life. you can see the video here!

5.question: is it free?
5.answer: yes! shelter is free to use, ad-free, and open source. it's a labor of love.

6.question: how is the data encrypted?
6.answer: the data is stored locally with strong encryption. you can learn more about our security protocols in our privacy policy.

7.question: who can see my data?
7.answer: nobody! even we can't read it. your entries are encrypted with your own key.

8.question: is it secure?
8.answer: yes. we use end-to-end encryption and a 'privacy-first' architecture to ensure your shelter remains yours alone.

9.question: who is machka?
9.answer:
she is our official mascot! you can often find her and her kitty ziggy wandering around the website.

special thanks to fiddle for creating all the wonderful artwork!

start.title: ready to rest?
start.description: start your journey at your own pace.
